description: Three UI improvements: (1) Remove X close button from card zoom overlays and make clicking anywhere close them, (2) Move ClanShield outside the owner badge in RegionDetailModal for better visibility, (3) Redesign FistIcon as a solid raised fist silhouette.
steps: In SeasonCardsModal.tsx and PlayerCardsModal.tsx, remove the X close button from the card zoom overlay and remove e.stopPropagation from the zoom content div so clicking anywhere including the image closes the overlay
In RegionDetailModal.tsx, move ClanShield outside and before the owner badge span, wrapping in a flex container for all occurrences
In Icons.tsx, replace the FistIcon SVG with a single solid filled path representing a raised fist silhouette
acceptance_criteria: Card zoom overlays have no X button and clicking anywhere closes them
ClanShield is visible outside the colored owner badge in the diorama
FistIcon renders as a solid raised fist silhouette with a single path
npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
